salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Presales Users
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT DeveloperName, Google_Email__c, Display_Name__c, Role__c, Is_Active__c FROM Presales_User__mdt WHERE Google_Email__c = ':demoEmail' AND Is_Active__c = true

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Contact by Email
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Email, PropHub_User_Id__c, Active_Demo_Project__c FROM Contact WHERE Email = ':email' LIMIT 1

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Active Projects
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Developer_Name__c, Brand_Primary_Color__c, Brand_Secondary_Color__c, Brand_Logo_URL__c, Description__c, Status__c, Default_Currency__c, (SELECT Id FROM Units__r) FROM Demo_Project__c WHERE Status__c = 'Active' ORDER BY Name ASC

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Project Detail
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Developer_Name__c, Brand_Primary_Color__c, Brand_Secondary_Color__c, Brand_Logo_URL__c, Description__c, Status__c, Default_Currency__c, (SELECT Id, Unit_Number__c, Status__c FROM Units__r) FROM Demo_Project__c WHERE Id = ':projectId' LIMIT 1

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java var baseQuery = "SELECT Id, Unit_Number__c, Building__c, Floor__c, Area_SQM__c, " ++ "Area_SQFT__c, Unit_Type__c, Status__c, Handover_Date__c, Total_Price__c, " ++ "Floor_Plan_URL__c, Payment_Completion__c, Demo_Project__c, Demo_Project__r.Name " ++ "FROM Unit__c " ++ "WHERE Demo_Project__c = '" ++ vars.projectId ++ "' " ++ "AND Owner_Contact__c = '" ++ vars.contactId ++ "'" var statusClause = if (vars.statusFilter != null) " AND Status__c = '" ++ vars.statusFilter ++ "'" else "" --- baseQuery ++ statusClause ++ " ORDER BY Building__c, Floor__c"

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Unit Detail
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Unit_Number__c, Building__c, Floor__c, Area_SQM__c, Area_SQFT__c, Unit_Type__c, Status__c, Handover_Date__c, Total_Price__c, Floor_Plan_URL__c, Payment_Completion__c, Demo_Project__c, Demo_Project__r.Name, Demo_Project__r.Brand_Primary_Color__c, Demo_Project__r.Brand_Secondary_Color__c, Owner_Contact__c, Owner_Contact__r.Name FROM Unit__c WHERE Id = ':unitId' LIMIT 1

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Installments
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Milestone_Name__c, Due_Date__c, Amount__c, Status__c, Paid_Date__c, Penalty_Amount__c, Sort_Order__c FROM Installment__c WHERE Unit__c = ':unitId' ORDER BY Sort_Order__c ASC

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Invoices
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Invoice_Date__c, Due_Date__c, Amount__c, Status__c, PDF_Attachment_Id__c FROM Invoice__c WHERE Unit__c = ':unitId' ORDER BY Invoice_Date__c DESC

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Invoice by ID
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, PDF_Attachment_Id__c FROM Invoice__c WHERE Id = ':invoiceId' AND Unit__c = ':unitId' LIMIT 1

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query ContentVersion
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Title, ContentDocumentId, VersionData FROM ContentVersion WHERE ContentDocumentId = ':contentDocId' AND IsLatest = true LIMIT 1

salesforce:query.doc:name: Download Content Body
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT VersionData FROM ContentVersion WHERE Id = ':versionId' LIMIT 1

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java var baseQuery = "SELECT Id, CaseNumber, Subject, Description, Status, Priority, " ++ "CreatedDate, ClosedDate, Service_Category__c, Preferred_Service_Date__c, " ++ "Related_Asset__c, Related_Asset__r.Name, " ++ "(SELECT Id, WorkOrderNumber, Status, StartDate, EndDate, Owner.Name FROM WorkOrders) " ++ "FROM Case " ++ "WHERE Unit__c = '" ++ vars.unitId ++ "'" var statusClause = if (vars.statusFilter != null) (if (vars.statusFilter == "open") " AND Status NOT IN ('Closed', 'Resolved')" else if (vars.statusFilter == "closed") " AND Status IN ('Closed', 'Resolved')" else "") else "" --- baseQuery ++ statusClause ++ " ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC"

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Service Request Detail
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, CaseNumber, Subject, Description, Status, Priority, CreatedDate, ClosedDate, Service_Category__c, Preferred_Service_Date__c, Unit__c, Related_Asset__c, Related_Asset__r.Name, (SELECT Id, WorkOrderNumber, Status, StartDate, EndDate, Description, Owner.Name FROM WorkOrders) FROM Case WHERE Id = ':requestId' LIMIT 1

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { id: payload[0].id, success: payload[0].success }

%dw 2.0 output application/java var filePart = vars.filePayload.parts.file --- [{ Title: filePart.headers."Content-Disposition".filename default "photo.jpg", PathOnClient: filePart.headers."Content-Disposition".filename default "photo.jpg", VersionData: filePart.content as Binary, FirstPublishLocationId: vars.requestId, Description: "Service request photo attachment" }]
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { id: payload[0].id, success: payload[0].success }

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Assets by Unit
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Category__c, Manufacturer__c, Serial_Number__c, Warranty_Start_Date__c, Warranty_End_Date__c, Warranty_Status__c, InstallDate, Status FROM Asset WHERE Unit__c = ':unitId' ORDER BY Category__c, Name

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Asset Detail
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Description, Category__c, Manufacturer__c, Serial_Number__c, Warranty_Start_Date__c, Warranty_End_Date__c, Warranty_Status__c, InstallDate, Status, Unit__c, Unit__r.Unit_Number__c FROM Asset WHERE Id = ':assetId' LIMIT 1

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Asset Maintenance
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, WorkOrderNumber, Subject, Description, Status, Priority, StartDate, EndDate, Owner.Name FROM WorkOrder WHERE Related_Asset__c = ':assetId' ORDER BY StartDate DESC

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java var baseQuery = "SELECT Id, Name, Demo_Project__c, Demo_Project__r.Name, " ++ "Description__c, Price_Range_Min__c, Price_Range_Max__c, " ++ "Expected_Handover__c, Hero_Image_URLs__c, Amenities__c, " ++ "Launch_Date__c, Is_Active__c, " ++ "(SELECT Id FROM Waitlist_Entries__r) " ++ "FROM Project_Launch__c " ++ "WHERE Is_Active__c = true" var projectClause = if (vars.projectIdFilter != null) " AND Demo_Project__c = '" ++ vars.projectIdFilter ++ "'" else "" --- baseQuery ++ projectClause ++ " ORDER BY Launch_Date__c DESC"

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Launch Detail
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Demo_Project__c, Demo_Project__r.Name, Demo_Project__r.Default_Currency__c, Description__c, Price_Range_Min__c, Price_Range_Max__c, Expected_Handover__c, Hero_Image_URLs__c, Amenities__c, Launch_Date__c, Is_Active__c FROM Project_Launch__c WHERE Id = ':launchId' LIMIT 1

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { id: payload[0].id, success: payload[0].success }
